programme.desc: During the Cincinnati Bengals' Week 17 victory over the Kansas City Chiefs (34-31), wide receiver Ja'Marr Chase turned in an impressive stat line: 11 receptions, 266 receiving yards and three touchdowns.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Houston Texans
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Houston Texans

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Houston Texans

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Houston Texans
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Houston Texans
programme.desc: The Texans begin reducing the roster in preparation for getting down to 53 players by opening day; the team travels to New Orleans to play the Saints in a preseason game.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Houston Texans
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Houston Texans
programme.desc: The Texans travel to Dallas for their final preseason game against the Cowboys; the coaching staff reduces the roster in preparation for the regular season opener with Kansas City.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Bones takes on the role of caddie in Part 2 of this 2-part series with YouTube sensation Rick Shiels where they go in-depth on how shot shape and club selection are critical on a windy day; Rick picks Bones' brain on a variety of shots.

programme.title: Golf's Top Instructors
programme.desc: In part 1, Jim joins Devan to share how to maximize power with driver, create all sorts of different trajectories with your irons, and putt like a pro.

programme.title: Golf's Top Instructors
programme.desc: In part 2, Jim joins Devan to share invaluable wisdom and game-saving tips from his years around the game in order to help you shoot your lowest scores ever.

programme.title: Top Tips: Celebrating Women in Golf
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty analyzes the swings of Rory McIlroy, Collin Morikawa and Jon Rahm to teach the three keys to a variety of challenging golf shots.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal go back to basics to achieve an ideal impact position with feet, hands, hips and shoulders; Martin reveals how a Samurai sword came in handy for Jack Nicklaus throughout his career; full swing extension.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal will reveal ways to gain distance like some of golf's greatest champions. Learn a simple back swing move used by Jack Nicklaus, exercises to increase club head speed and power tips from a book by Sam Snead.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Instruction on how to control the line and speed of your putts; a lesson on how to match your putting stroke with the different styles of putter.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to become a wedge wizard around the green like WGC-Mexico defending champion Phil Mickelson, who appeared on "School of Golf" in 2017 to share his short-game secrets.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The players compete for a season-long Super Immunity prize, which could give one competitor a distinct advantage over his/her opponents.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The player holding Super Immunity receives an extra incentive to stay out of the elimination challenge. Competitors must make crucial decisions to earn immunity, and one player attempts to bait the competition into an early exit from the show.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Players must traverse the flop wall and successfully predict their opponents' outcomes in order to gain immunity; a questionable strategy threatens to send one player home.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Players must choose teams at breakfast; and one captain bases selections on personal relationships. Meanwhile, another player makes no friends in a move that turns the entire series on an emotional roller coaster.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Competitors must rely on one another to earn safety as team formats rule the challenges. A shaky performance must be overcome to keep the Super Immunity out of play, while an unexpected twist sends players directly to the elimination challenge.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach setup and swing keys for players that need to stop the slice; Martin shares a drill that helped one of his students win a major championship and a tip he learned working with Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal honor Arnold Palmer and his lasting legacy on golf instruction. They demonstrate the two anchors to Palmer's powerful swing and drills to add a little Arnie to your own game.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach cures for fatal flaws in golf games. Learn drills to get into the proper position at the top with the driver, ways to improve iron play, and a tip to correct the single biggest flaw in the short game.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the setup and swing keys needed to stick approach shots. Martin shares a drill to help make solid contact, reveals the three important post-impact checkpoints, and shows how to develop proper lower body action.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: This lesson features tips on improving drives, chipping and putting, with useful advice for everyone.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach the key shots in the scoring zone. Martin reveals a tip for mid-wedge shots he learned in-person from 2019 Masters champion Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach great drills that require a partner. Martin also teaches teamwork tips for driving it longer, sticking your approach shots, hitting solid pitch shots, and making more putts.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to putt like the U.S. Open champion. Learn drills to improve your grip, aim, path and keys to sinking more putts. Martin also discusses what you can learn from Ben Hogan's legendary ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal join PGA TOUR stars on the range at the Rocket Mortgage Classic to teach how to hit it like the pros. Martin shares inside the ropes secrets to help crush the driver, make solid contact with irons, and spin wedges.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: School of Golf celebrates its 300th episode milestone by reliving the lessons that Arnold Palmer, Tom Watson, and more Hall of Famers taught over the show's nine seasons.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: The feet are pivotal in the swing for balance and proper weight shift; Martin explains how the feet should sequence during the swing and offers drills for proper movement and balance.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: Martin shows how the knees should flex and straighten throughout the swing to maintain power and balance.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.sub-title: Golf Vs Snowboarding: Shaun White Part 1
programme.desc: Olympic gold medalist Shaun White shares how the basics of snowboarding can translate to the golf swing.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.sub-title: Golf Vs Snowboarding: Shaun White Part 2
programme.desc: Olympic gold medalist Shaun White shares how snowboarding moves like backflips and complex tricks can translate to the golf swing.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter, 12-time European Tour winner and Ryder Cup stalwart, showcases his very best putting instruction. He shares his best advice on how to improve your scoring from all distances on the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter showcases his very best putting instruction. He teaches how to make more putts focusing on comfort and your natural abilities on the greens.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter gives advice on lowering a handicap through better iron play.

programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
